title: Min Cost to Connect All Points
titleCn: 连接所有点的最小费用

testcases.input: points = [[0,0],[2,2],[3,10],[5,2],[7,0]] Output: 20 Explanation: We can connect the points as shown above to get the minimum cost of 20. Notice that there is a unique path between every pair of points.
testcases.expectedOutput: 20 Explanation: We can connect the points as shown above to get the minimum cost of 20. Notice that there is a unique path between every pair of points.
